name: pathway-claude-skills
description: Jo Lopez's Claude Code plugins and skills. Each plugin lives in its own folder at the root of this repo.

plugins.name: pathway
plugins.description: The Pathway Design System tooling plugin. Five skills covering the full lifecycle of an Amplify component — from Figma handoff check through to a shipped component in GitHub and Storybook.

plugins.name: mb-product-intelligence
plugins.description: Ministry Brands Product Intelligence. Three skills for product teams — Knowledgebase Maker, Knowledgebase Assistant, and Persona Maker.
